title: Lycopodioides lingulata
taxonomy: Lycopodioides lingulata is classified within the family Selaginellaceae, which is part of the division Lycopodiophyta. This division is a group of vascular plants that are known as lycopods. Lycopodiophyta is further grouped into the phylum Lycopodiophyta, which is a distinct phylum within the plant kingdom.
